All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Battleship
View class of Battleship that contains all methods and variables to show the game.
BattleshipController
A controller implementation for a GUI view.
BattleshipGame
The game implementation of Battleship.
BattleshipGameTest
unit tests for the `BattleshipGame` model.
Cards
The Cards class contains all data to represent the game elements of Battleship.
CardsG
CardsG that is sent between players at the beginning of the game.
CardsTest
unit tests for the `Cards` class.
ClientServerThread
This is a thread that can be either a client or a server.
GameState
All possible game states.
IBattleshipController
The interface of a controller from the perspective of a view object.
IBattleshipView
This interface contains all necessary classes of a view to be usable by the controller.
MainAny
A processing view for the Battleship.
PlayedCardE
PlayedCardE that is sent between players after each move, when on enemyCard played.
PlayedCardIO
PlayedCardIO that is sent between players after each move, when on ownCaard played.
